description: Unified stub/TODO debt census combining exported taxonomy status with critical non-exported source debt and deterministic risk ranking.

entries.message: POSIX longjmp: implementation pending (requires unsafe for real impl)
POSIX setjmp: implementation pending (requires unsafe for real impl)

notes: Exported status and source debt are reported in separate sections to avoid blind spots.
Non-exported critical TODO debt is explicitly ranked so hidden backlog cannot be mistaken for zero debt.
Replacement/interpose claim alignment is included so policy drift is visible in the same ledger.
